description: Model a standard 2x2 interlocking plastic brick (compatible with LEGO dimensions) in FreeCAD. The model must feature a 15.8mm x 15.8mm x 9.6mm main body, four top studs (4.8mm diameter, 1.8mm height, 8mm center-to-center spacing), a hollowed interior from the bottom with a uniform wall thickness of 1.2mm, and a central reinforcement tube (6.5mm outer diameter, 4.8mm inner diameter) extending from the inner roof to the bottom plane. Save the result as a single solid body to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/brick_2x2.FCStd.
